Notice Of Motion & Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-28-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Daniel Merrick, Esq., of COOLEY MANION JONES HAKE KUROWSKI LLP (415-512-4381), appearing for defendant / moving party Munnell & Sherrill, Inc.
Bryn C. Gallagher, Esq., of CLAPPER, PATTI, SCHWEIZER & MASON (415-332-4262), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Rory Snell

RULING:
DEFENDANT MUNNELL & SHERRILL, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFFS COMPLAINT

Argued and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Munnell & Sherrill, Inc.'s motion to strike portions of plaintiff's complaint is denied in part and off calendar in part. Defendant's motion to strike punitive damages is denied. Plaintiff's complaint adequately pleads defendant's liability for punitive damages. Defendant's motion regarding joint venture and conspiracy is off calendar per the parties' June 14 stipulation. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR # 11288 = (220/HEK)
